overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded character walking through a desert canyon at night under bright moonlight. The scene features tall rock formations and sandy terrain, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with cinematic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert canyon under bright moonlight

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through the canyon, illuminated from behind by moonlight

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with layered sedimentary textures
sloped desert rock formation with sparse vegetation
bright full moon illuminating the canyon from above
sandy trail with visible footprints and tire tracks
rocky canyon walls visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide desert canyon at night, with the moon clearly visible overhead casting cool blue light across the sandy terrain. Tall rock formations line both sides of the path, with the right canyon wall gradually approaching as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage with steep walls

events.description: canyon narrows significantly as right wall closes in and sky visibility reduces
character moves into deeper shadow as canyon walls block direct moonlight

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrowing canyon passage with right wall now very close

segments.scene_description: The canyon narrows into a more enclosed passage with the right rock wall now dominating the near foreground. The moon moves out of view as the walls rise higher, casting the path into deeper shadow while the character continues walking toward the distant canyon exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide desert canyon that gradually tightens into a shadowed, enclosed passage. It begins with the character walking across sandy terrain under a bright moon that casts a cool blue light across the landscape and towering rock formations. As the character moves forward, the right canyon wall steadily approaches and begins to dominate the foreground. The scene then shifts as the walls rise higher, causing the moon to slip out of view and plunging the path into deeper shadow. The camera continues its forward progression, following the character through the narrowing corridor toward a distant exit.
